project: Cloud-Based ML Pipeline for Network Intrusion Detection
source: Canadian Institute for Cybersecurity, University of New Brunswick

raw.description: Original, unmodified CSV files from the CIC-IDS-2017 dataset
raw.schema_note: 79 columns including network flow features and a ' Label' column (with leading space)

processed.description: Cleaned dataset produced by the ETL pipeline
processed.schema_note: 79 columns; column names stripped of whitespace; Label binarised (0=Benign, 1=Attack)
transformations: Column names stripped of leading/trailing whitespace

curated.description: Feature-selected dataset ready for model training in Phase 2

lineage: raw/ -> ETL (scripts/etl_pipeline.py) -> processed/ -> Feature Selection (notebooks/eda_processed.ipynb) -> curated/
